title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Vision of Kummâ
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Vision of Kummâ.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Vision of Kummâ.

translation.text: From 'The Vision of Kummâ': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
